title: Susan Landwehr
compiled_truth: Susan Landwehr is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-07-31), Susan Landwehr sent 61 and received 734 emails, totalling 795 interactions.
